scope: Consent-based privacy verification for ordinary video calls. This matrix does not cover proctoring, cheating prevention, anti-detection, or bypassing platform controls.

states.expectedObserverResult: CallPilot may be visible if it is on the shared screen. Privacy controls must be unavailable.
Observer should not see readable CallPilot content. If content is visible, mark this platform and share target as failed.
Observer should not see the CallPilot window because it is hidden.

blockedUseCases: LeetCode or similar interview/proctoring anti-detection checks
Bypassing screen monitoring, browser monitoring, or platform integrity controls
Claiming universal invisibility across third-party platforms
